_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in establishing data security controls.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.676), SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.643).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.667). Shared vocabulary: [controls, data, security]. DCWF-only terms [establishing, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, encryption, identity, isolation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.932, R=0.873). P exceeds R by 0.059 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in establishing data security controls." and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.695 ≈ STS 0.667 (gap 0.028). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [controls, data, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [controls, data, security]. DCWF-only: [establishing, skill]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, encryption, identity, isolation, knowledge].
